_doc: Mocks an upload of a voice note from the claimant's iPhone (post-cycle standup). The platform stores the M4A externally and writes an EVIDENCE_UPLOADED chain event with this metadata + extracted_content (audio transcript via Whisper-class ASR client-side).

extracted_content.document_summary: Post-N12-quench voice standup recorded by Priya Ramachandran. Reports the result, the comparison vs N10/N11, the visual inspection, and the planned XRD follow-up. Spoken in English; transcribed locally before upload (no cloud round-trip).
extracted_content.transcript: Okay quick note for the record. N12 is out of the quench bath. Specimen is intact — all four corners, no cracking at the fillet, no visible defects in the gauge section. This is the first B+8% run that's survived the 200 K per second quench from 830. N10 and N11 both cracked at the 1.6 mm fillet so this is a real result. Mass loss looks like point zero one eight grams, which is within the N7 tolerance. I want to get the cross section under the microscope tomorrow and book the high-temp XRD stage for Thursday. If diffraction confirms gamma-prime stability for the full 60 second window we close the N7 hypothesis branch and we open the casting trial. End of note.
extracted_content.speaker: Priya Ramachandran

activities.title: Vantage-7 phase-stability program
activities.rationale: Contemporaneous voice record of the N12 quench outcome and the next-step decision tree.
